title: carex marahuacana
intro: Carex marahuacana, also known as Pima bean or Pima bean sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae that is native to the Americas. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve insulin sensitivity, which may be beneficial for individuals with type 2 diabetes. The health benefits of Carex marahuacana include its potential to regulate blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support weight management. Carex marahuacana can be used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, by boiling the roots or leaves in water to release its medicinal properties.
